nasb.text: And His voice shook the earth then, but now He has promised, saying, “Yet once more I will shake not only the earth, but also the heaven.”

esv.text: At that time his voice shook the earth, but now he has promised, “Yet once more I will shake not only the earth but also the heavens.”

cnv.text: 當時他的聲音震動了地；現在他卻應許說：“下一次，我不但要震動地，還要震動天。”

ccb.text: 那时上帝的声音震动了大地，但现在祂应许说：“再一次，我不单要震动地，还要震动天。”

csbs.text: 那时候，他的声音震动了大地，但如今他应许说：“我不仅要再一次震动地，而且还要震动天。”
